turns.text: having activating my UTR, it asks me to login to UTR, link external account which has already been selected, and then to log out and then back in to match centre. this does not work, it keeps sending me back round in circles and saying i need to link my account

It sounds like you're trying to activate your UTR rating through **Tennis Australia's Match Centre**, and you're getting stuck in a loop where it keeps asking you to link your account even after you've done so.

Here are the steps that should resolve this:

1. Go to [Match Centre](https://matchcentre.tennis.com.au/) and sign in to your **Tennis Australia account**.
2. Click **"Activate My UTR Rating"** on your Match Centre profile.
3. Click **"Sign In To UTR Sports Account"** and enter your UTR Sports email and password.
4. Once signed in, you should see a success confirmation that your profiles are linked.

If you're still looping after following these steps, it may also help to try linking from the UTR Sports side:
1. Log in to UTR Sports.
2. Go to **Settings > Sign-[location]**.
3. Select **Link my Tennis Australia Account**.

Did either of these approaches work for you, or are you still running into the loop?
my match centre ID is 66336986429

Thanks for sharing that. It sounds like the linking is still not completing properly on the platform side — something support team will need to investigate for you.

Could you please provide me with the following so I can get a ticket raised for you?

- **Your full name**
- **The email address on your UTR Sports account**
louise mousli [email]
Thanks, Louise! Let me get that ticket submitted for you now.

I wasn't able to confirm your ticket was submitted. Here's what we can do:

1. **Try Again** — I can attempt it once more now
2. **Email Support Directly** — reach our team at [email] with your issue details and they'll help
3. **Come Back Later** — this is usually a temporary issue; you can try again in a few minutes

Which would you like to do? If you've already received a ticket number from us, you can disregard this.
I can help you with duplicate player profiles! To get started, could you let me know which of the following applies to your situation?
My own duplicate profiles
Got it! Could you share the links (URLs) to both profiles? If you don't have the URLs, the display names and location will work too.
Katelyn Hardy, both profiles are located in chandler, az

Thanks! Which of the two profiles would you like to keep as your primary profile? If you can tell me any distinguishing details (such as which one has more match history, or any other difference), that would be helpful.
one has history and the other doesnt. i want the one with all the history as my main and also the one that i dont want has a projected utr not a set number

Perfect, that's clear — you'd like to keep the profile with match history and a set UTR rating as your primary, and merge/remove the one with the projected UTR and no history.

Could you share your name and email address so I can submit this request to our support team?
Katelyn Hardy, [email]

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is #846096. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

In the meantime, please avoid creating any new accounts or making significant changes to either profile while the merge request is under review. Is there anything else I can help you with?
nope all good thank you
You're welcome, Katelyn! Good luck out there on the court. 🎾 Take care!
I can help you with Pro Tennis Tour (PTT) inquiries! Let me connect you with the right information.
What would you like to know about Pro Tennis Tour? Here are some common topics I can help with:
PTT Tour Card

I don't have specific details about the PTT Tour Card in my knowledge base at this time. I wouldn't want to give you inaccurate information, so I'd recommend connecting you with a human support agent who can provide the correct details.

To get you to the right place, could you share the following:

- Your email address
